artPrompt: A hulking horror crouches just within the mouth of a rusted storm drain, two cold luminous eyes and a clawed dripping limb emerging from the black grate into the murk, sickly green bioluminescence outlining its bulk. The wide frame towers the concrete culvert over the slick puddled ground under a bruised sky. One faint glow from inside the drain is the only light, rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Storm Drain Lurker
text:
Menace
Storm Drain Lurker can't be blocked by creatures with toughness 2 or less. (Whatever's down there is bigger than it has any right to be.)
flavorText: Kids dared each other to look down the grate. Now the town is short a few kids.
